summary: Classified the two open candidate refs from the cluster. #13620 remains the best live canonical for Telegram media-group/album support and should stay open for product/maintainer follow-up. #47856 is hydrated as security-sensitive and is routed to central security handling. No close, merge, or fix-PR action is safe for this cluster in this pass.

actions.reason: Best live canonical issue for the Telegram album/media-group feature remains open, but the requested behavior is product/feature work rather than a narrow executable fix.
Open security-sensitive candidate must be routed to central OpenClaw security triage and must not receive backlog cleanup, close, merge, or fix-PR mutations.
